name: Cheese Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, melt butter and cheese, stirring frequently.
2. Remove from heat. Sift together sugar and cocoa; add to cheese, mixing well.
3. Stir in non-fat dry milk, vanilla, and nuts.
4. Turn into a 9x9x2-inch pan. Chill until firm.
5. Makes 3 pounds.
